title: lastrea subattenuata
intro: Lastrea subattenuata is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Asia and is also known as the 'thin-rimmed lady fern'. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Lastrea subattenuata include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and aiding in wound healing, and it can be prepared as an infusion or tincture for herbal remedies.
